refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-functions allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time components (load, travel, dump) individually and in aggregate under representative duty cycles to verify meeting p95 ≤ CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load operation timing affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable but require coordination; interfaces must be well-defined to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site telemetry for travel optimization
Risk of timing misalignment between load, travel, and dump operations impacting cycle time
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and integration of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time data for travel path optimization and load/dump status

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets

module_containment_scores.notes: Central coordination module; high containment of cycle time optimization logic
Executes physical load, travel, dump operations; moderate containment
Supports remote control but less involved in cycle time optimization
Primarily safety monitoring; minimal role in cycle time

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves coordination.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple sub-functions
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for load, travel, and dump control.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement is clear and sub-FRs are logically decomposed; selected DPs address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity in NGHE Solution module
Interface management between NGHE Solution and Vehicle
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as owner; diffusion risks manageable with interface discipline.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at system level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module is clear and aligns with system ownership.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies between load, travel, and dump operations.
Refine interface definitions between NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules to reduce diffusion risk.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.

revise.why: To introduce explicit coordination DP or interface managing timing dependencies among sub-functions.

assumptions: Site telemetry data is accurate and timely
Vehicle module can execute commands with predictable timing
open_risks: Timing misalignment between sub-operations impacting cycle time
Integration complexity in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance data validating cycle time under representative duty cycles
Interface latency and reliability metrics between NGHE Solution and Vehicle
